name: Bokkisam Venkata Sai Nivas (B. V. S. Nivas Chowdary)
headline: CS Student — Python, C++, JavaScript | AI/ML & DevOps
bio: Computer Science student building scalable, containerized, data-driven systems. Proficient in Python, C++, JavaScript, Docker, and Git; experienced in data structures, algorithms, and system design. Seeking internships and SWE roles in AI infrastructure and production systems.

description: Automated the career glow-up of thousands of developers by providing 6 interactable WebGL backgrounds they didn't know they needed.
Reduced 'Time to Landing Page' from weeks of CSS wrestling to 3 minutes of JSON editing — causing a 400% increase in developer confidence.
Successfully defended the 'Portfolio-as-Code' philosophy against the invading forces of drag-and-drop website builders.
Implemented a Dual-Trigger Easter Egg discovery system: Double-click the status badge for a background shockwave, or the Navbar logo for a sequential branding makeover.
Engineered a context-aware theme engine that intelligently preserves readability by selectively applying color palettes based on Light/Dark mode state.
Centering a <div> while simultaneously maintaining Backdrop Blur (12px) without causing a browser meltdown.
Optimized GSAP entrance choreography to be 45% more 'satisfying' according to highly scientific internal audits.
Engineered a glassmorphism navigation system so floating it actually feels like it's made of real glass (without the risk of cuts).
Wrote 1,000+ lines of SCSS using CSS Custom Properties so users don't have to look at hex codes ever again.
Defended a groundbreaking thesis on why developers should spend time coding features, not fighting with HTML boilerplate.
Minor in 'Monochromatic Theme Synchronization' — proving that any website looks elite with the right accent color.
Dean's List for 'Most Optimized Jekyll Build Time' (2025).
Mastered the art of JSON-to-Elite-Portfolio transformation.
Learned to orchestrate GSAP and Vanta.js for maximum cinematic impact.

projects.title: { TheProFile }
projects.description: A high-fidelity Portfolio-as-Code template. Focus on content in a single JSON file while the engine handles design, cinematic audio, and WebGL. Pro-tip: Double-click the Navbar logo for a branding makeover, or the 'Available for work' badge for background magic.

projects.title: Open Certificate Generator
projects.description: An automated bulk certificate generation engine. Designed for hackathons and organizations to generate branded, professional certificates from raw data in seconds.

projects.title: Copilot Team Workflow
projects.description: A comprehensive framework of standards and workflows for maximizing team velocity with GitHub Copilot. Includes optimized prompts and pair-programming patterns for elite teams.

recommendations.text: I built TheProFile specifically to solve my own frustration with complex portfolio maintenance. Pro-tip: Double-click the 'Available for opportunities' badge for a little surprise.
recommendations.name: SriSatyaLokesh
recommendations.title: Creator of TheProFile

recommendations.text: TheProFile is so good, it actually convinced me to stop using React for a simple landing page. My Lighthouse score is 100/100 and my hands are finally clean of node_modules.
recommendations.name: A Grateful Developer
recommendations.title: Escaped React Dev

recommendations.text: The Portfolio-as-Code philosophy is exactly what I needed. I spend all day in VS Code; why would I want to build my site in a browser drag-and-drop tool?
recommendations.name: Backend Guru
recommendations.title: Senior YAML Architect
